Perf Check: LCP < 2.5s; images WebP; no unused JS
SEO Check: Title unique; meta desc; H1; OG; Schema:AboutPage; internal links present
A11y Check: H1>H2>H3 hierarchy; img alts; font ≥16px; contrast OK
Security Check: External links noopener; no form risk
Content Check: Team info accurate; mission aligned with brand; NEXQON reference correct; no outdated info
Functional Check: All internal links work; social links open correctly; CTA buttons navigate
Notes: Verify NEXQON / cloudbasket relationship is stated correctly

SEO Check: Title unique; meta desc; H1; noindex if no open roles; Schema:JobPosting if roles listed
A11y Check: Heading structure; apply CTA ARIA labeled; job listing markup accessible
Security Check: CSRF if apply form present; file upload validation if resume upload exists
Content Check: Job listings current; no expired roles; contact info correct; role descriptions complete
Functional Check: Apply link works; contact form sends; email link opens mail client
Notes: ⚠️ Add noindex meta if page has no active job listings

Perf Check: LCP < 2s; pricing table no CLS; toggle no layout shift
SEO Check: Title unique; meta desc; H1; Schema:Offer or PriceSpecification; OG tags
A11y Check: Pricing table screen-reader readable; toggle labeled; keyboard nav; plan cards accessible
Security Check: Price data not client-manipulable; checkout links HTTPS only; no hardcoded credentials
Content Check: Prices accurate in INR; feature matrix correct; CTA labels clear (Free/Pro/Enterprise); FAQs present
Functional Check: Plan toggle switches; CTA leads to correct signup; Contact Sales link works
Notes: Verify prices match actual product tier offerings — critical before launch

Perf Check: Fast load; partner logos WebP; lazy-load logos
SEO Check: Title; meta desc; H1; Schema:Organization; partner link tracking
A11y Check: Logo img alts; heading structure; keyboard nav OK
Security Check: External partner links noopener; no sensitive partner data exposed
Content Check: Partner logos current; descriptions accurate; apply CTA clear; no stale partnerships listed
Functional Check: Partner logos load; apply/contact link works; external partner links open correctly
Notes: Verify all listed partners are active — remove stale entries

Perf Check: LCP < 2s; app store images optimized; no excess JS
SEO Check: Title; meta desc; H1; Schema:SoftwareApplication; OG with app preview image
A11y Check: App preview img alts; download CTA ARIA labeled; mobile layout accessible
Security Check: External app store links noopener; no app credentials exposed
Content Check: App description accurate; download links valid; platform icons correct (iOS/Android)
Functional Check: App store links open correctly; QR code functional if present; feedback link works
Notes: Confirm app store links point to live published listings — not placeholders
